about.title: About Shifaa
about.subtitle: We are building a trusted digital healthcare platform that makes care more accessible, personal, and reliable.
about.storyText: Shifaa started with a simple mission: remove friction from healthcare journeys. From finding specialists to managing appointments, we help patients feel informed and supported at every step.

values.trustDesc: Verified professionals and transparent patient feedback.
values.innovationDesc: Modern tools designed to simplify care decisions.
values.patientFirstDesc: Every feature is built around patient comfort and clarity.

about.partnersText: We collaborate with healthcare providers, clinics, and technology partners to deliver a reliable healthcare experience.
about.ctaTitle: Join thousands of patients on Shifaa

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about appointments, reviews, and your account.

items.q1: How do I book an appointment?
items.a1: Choose a doctor, select a date and time, then confirm your booking from the doctor details page.
items.a2: Yes. Open My Appointments and cancel upcoming bookings in one click.
items.a3: Ratings are calculated from verified patient reviews submitted after appointments.
items.a4: We use secure authentication and protected APIs to keep your personal data safe.
items.q5: How do I leave a review?
items.a5: After logging in, open a doctor profile and submit your rating and optional comment.
items.a6: Current bookings are confirmation-based. Payment method support is expanding soon.
items.a7: Use the Contact Us page and our team will respond as quickly as possible.
items.q8: Can I book for someone else?
items.a8: Yes, you can book using patient details and coordinate the appointment time.

terms.title: Terms & Privacy
terms.subtitle: Please review our policies before using the Shifaa platform.
terms.tosText: By using Shifaa, you agree to provide accurate information and use the platform responsibly.
terms.privacyText: We only use your personal data to provide core services like appointments and notifications.
terms.cookieText: Cookies help us improve performance, remember language settings, and personalize your experience.

journey.title: Concierge Care Journey
journey.subtitle: Experience clinical care that respects your time and health goals with our refined three-step protocol.

1.title: Find Your Curator
1.description: Search through our exclusive network of board-certified specialists tailored to your needs.

2.title: Precise Booking
2.description: Select a time slot that matches your lifestyle. Real-time availability with zero wait times.

3.title: Virtual or In-Person
3.description: Consult via high-definition telehealth or visit our luxury clinical departments in person.

testimonials.title: Voices of Trust
testimonials.subtitle: Clinical Curator is not just about finding a doctor; it is about the precision and care of the entire patient journey.

1.name: Julian V. Brooks
1.review: Effortless scheduling and specialists who truly listened to every detail before the consultation.

2.name: Mona El-Sayed
2.review: The booking flow was fast, the doctor was clear, and the follow-up plan felt carefully organized.

3.name: Khaled Samir
3.review: Smooth from search to booking. I appreciated the calm interface and instant access to top doctors.

cta.subtitle: We are always looking for distinguished specialists to join our clinical community. Provide your patients with a premium digital sanctuary.
